2025 income up to date of filing.

Pursuant to the partnership agreement, 90 days following my withdrawal from the firm, I will receive a lump-sum payment of my capital account.  This payment will be calculated as of the date of my withdrawal. (2014-01-01)

Pursuant to the partnership agreement, profit sharing contributions withheld from my salary for 2025 will be deposited into the Plan on April 15, 2026. I will continue to participate in this defined contribution plan until this deposit is made, after which I will rollover this defined contribution plan. (2014-01-01)

The Rabbi Trust was established on March 31, 2001. Payments to me will begin the first quarter ending after I turn 67, which will be 12/31/2026.  I will receive a payment in the amount of $14,749.34 for 12 quarters starting then with final payment being made on 9/30/29. (2001-03-01)
